basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NIIST Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute For Interdisciplinary Science and Technology (CSIR-NIIST)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute For Interdisciplinary Science and Technology (CSIR-NIIST) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of Project Associate-I posts under various projects at CSIR-NIIST. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-NIIST Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Physically handicapped and female candidates as per GOI/CSIR Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Chemistry / Polymer Chemistry, B.Tech in Chemical / Polymer Engineering, M.Sc in Chemistry, B.Tech in Chemical Engineering, M.Sc in Chemistry / Applied Chemistry, M.Sc in Physics
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-8 Chemistry/Polymer Chemistry/Chemical/Polymer Engg (Polymer Composites): M.Sc in Chemistry / Polymer Chemistry from a recognized University or Equivalent. OR B.Tech in Chemical / Polymer Engineering from a recognized University or Equivalent. Desirable: Experience in resin synthesis. Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-13 Chemistry/Chemical: M.Sc in Chemistry from a recognized University or Equivalent. OR B.Tech in Chemical Engineering from a recognized University or Equivalent. Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-18 Chemistry/Applied Chemistry: M.Sc in Chemistry / Applied Chemistry from a recognized University or Equivalent. Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-20 Chemistry: M.Sc in Chemistry from a recognized University or Equivalent. Project Associate-I (PAT-I) CSET-8 Physics: M.Sc in Physics from a recognized University or Equivalent. Desirable: Experience in Optoelectronic device fabrication.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-8 Chemistry/Polymer Chemistry/Chemical/Polymer Engg (Polymer Composites)

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-8, MSTD-13, MSTD-18, CSET-8: Rs. 31,000/- + 20% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + 20% HRA (others) Project Associate-I (PAT-I) MSTD-20: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 30,000/- + 20% HRA (others)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-NIIST?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I posts at CSIR-NIIST is scheduled for 23rd June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR-NIIST. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by specialization but generally include M.Sc in Chemistry, Polymer Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Physics, or B.Tech in Chemical or Polymer Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Associate-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Physically handicapped and female candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus 20% HRA, depending on whether the candidate is NET/GATE qualified or not.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for CSIR-NIIST recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview. A written test may be conducted if deemed necessary by the institute.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates, along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the CSIR-NIIST office in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695019.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Project Associate-I positions are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job type.
